# kSecAttrRounds

**Global Variable**

A key whose value indicates the number of rounds to run the pseudorandom function.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrRounds: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFNumber] and indicates the number of rounds to run the pseudorandom function specified by [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrPRF] for a cryptographic key.
title: kSecAttrRounds
